surfaces.label: Page 1

zones.label: Envelope Window — Return Address
zones.rule: This area is visible through the top envelope window. Place your logo or return address here.

zones.label: Envelope Window — Recipient Address
zones.rule: This area is visible through the bottom envelope window. Overlaps with the address block printed by Lob.

zones.label: Address Block
zones.rule: No design content allowed. Lob prints the recipient address here. This area must remain white.

zones.label: QR Code Zone
zones.rule: Lob prints a white 0.5" box with a QR code here for mail piece tracking. Do not design into this corner.

zones.label: Sequence ID Zone
zones.rule: Lob prints a machine-readable sequence identifier here. Do not design into this area.

surfaces.llmPrompt:
You are designing PAGE 1 of a legal 8.5×14" letter.

Canvas: 8.5" wide × 14" tall. NO bleed — there is a 1/16" (0.0625") clear space border where no content can appear. Letters cannot have edge-to-edge color.

Fold pattern: This letter folds into a #10 envelope using a double parallel fold: 3.75" / 3.25" / 3.25" / 3.75" sections. Fold lines at 3.75" and 7" from top.

Zone restrictions on Page 1:
- ADDRESS BLOCK: A 3.15" × 2" rectangle at 0.6" from left, 0.84" from top must be COMPLETELY WHITE. Lob prints the recipient address here.
- ENVELOPE WINDOW (return): A 3.25" × 0.875" area at 0.63" from left, 0.5" from top is visible through the top envelope window.
- ENVELOPE WINDOW (recipient): A 4" × 1" area at 0.63" from left, 1.71" from top is visible through the bottom envelope window.
- QR CODE: A 0.5" × 0.5" white box at 0.087" from the left and bottom edges.
- SEQUENCE ID: A 1.45" × 0.09" strip at 0.3" from left, 2.2375" from bottom.

Design tips:
- Be mindful of fold lines at 3.75" and 7" — avoid placing critical content directly on these lines.
- The top-left quadrant is heavily reserved — design your main content in the right half and lower portion.
- Max 3 sheets for legal letters.
- Merge variables like {{name}} can be used anywhere outside reserved zones.

surfaces.label: Subsequent Pages (2+)

zones.label: QR Code Zone
zones.rule: Lob prints a white 0.5" box with a QR code here for mail piece tracking.

zones.label: Sequence ID Zone
zones.rule: Lob prints a machine-readable sequence identifier here.

surfaces.llmPrompt:
You are designing a SUBSEQUENT PAGE (page 2+) of a legal 8.5×14" letter.

Canvas: 8.5" wide × 14" tall. NO bleed — 1/16" clear space border. No edge-to-edge color.

Fold lines at 3.75" and 7" from top — avoid placing critical content directly on folds.

Zone restrictions:
- QR CODE: 0.5" × 0.5" white box at 0.087" from left and bottom edges.
- SEQUENCE ID: 1.45" × 0.09" at 0.3" from left, 2.2375" from bottom.

Design tips:
- Subsequent pages have much more usable space than page 1.
- Be mindful of fold lines — content crossing folds may be hard to read.
- Max 3 sheets for legal letters.

notes: Double parallel fold: 3.75" / 3.25" / 3.25" / 3.75" to fit #10 envelope.
No edge-to-edge printing — 1/16" clear space on all sides.
